docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED AND REQUESTED TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-10-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-19-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMATO, BRIDGET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAMPSCHROEDER, GRETCHEN $1,107.87 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,137.87, DEFT DID NOT PROVIDE ITEMIZED STATEMENT WITHIN 21 DAYS AFTER PLFT VACATED APARTMENT, & THEREFORE MAY NOT DEDUCT CHARGES FOR DAMAGES, REPAIRS, UTILITIES OR RENT FROM SECURITY DEPOSIT. JUDGMENT REFLECTS $92.13 PAID TO PLFT. THIS JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJ TO DEFT'S RIGHT TO SEEK RECOVERY FROM PLFT FOR THE AMOUNTS CLAIMED FOR DAMAGES/REPAIRS UTILITES ETC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
